title: ourisia lactea
intro: Ourisia lactea, also known as the white foxglove, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Ourisia lactea include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve heart health, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ourisia lactea can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
